title: 11 Herbal Tinctures For Colds
description: Eucalyptus globulus tinctures contains compounds like eucalyptol, borneol, and camphor, which are known to have decongestant and expectorant properties. These properties help to relieve congestion and make it easier to cough up mucus, which is often a problem when you have a cold. Eucalyptol, in particular, is a natural anti-inflammatory that can help to reduce swelling in the nasal passages and sinuses.
